name: annotation_preferences_list_available_annotations
desc: List annotation families available across the model and the configured user / business family folders, plus the most recently used picks.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Optional BuiltInCategory name (e.g. OST_PipeTags) to filter results.

parameters.name: user_folder
parameters.description: Optional override for the user family folder; defaults to %APPDATA%/MEPBridge/Families/Tags.

parameters.name: business_folder
parameters.description: Optional override for the business family folder.
